procedures.name: Add key
procedures.method: Read immobiliser data from the opened original working key with APB300; prepare a supported replacement key/PCB

required_hardware: Supported Autel IKEY or key PCB
tool_support.limits: Add Key only; keyed/KESSY applicability and exact key PCB must be confirmed.

procedures.name: All keys lost
procedures.method: No AKL support is inferred from APB300 working-key coverage
